public_question: By the resolution date, does public authority reporting identify a BDBV-related case or response signal for kampala-uga in relation to the 2026 DRC/Uganda outbreak corridor from bunia?
resolution_source_policy: Resolve from public MOH, WHO, Africa CDC, CDC, ECDC, INRB, or other cited public authority reporting available by the resolution date; unresolved or ambiguous public evidence remains open until documented review.
